All of this started-

Is it possible Joyce will blame Eleven for everything that has happened?
reply_content:
No, I doubt that. 
Joyce has loved and cared for Eleven from the first moment they met in season 1. 

Joyce has been her mother and she took El along with Jonathan and Will when they left Hawkins and moved to California after she thought that Hopper died in season 3; Joyce took care of El for almost a year. 
El found Will for Joyce in season 1 so she and Hopper could save him from the upside down and Joyce found and saved Hopper from Russia in season 4 and brought him back to Hawkins for everyone, but especially for El. 

El has friends, family and the mother and father she’s always wanted and deserved in both Joyce and Hopper.
